Preconditions:
1. Store_1 > Notification  Notification_1 set active
  2. Template for Localization_2 was not created. (e.g. For de-DE)
  3. Default template Template_1 for Notification_1 was created
  4. User_1 created for store
  5. User_1 email set as Email_1
  6. Admin logged in admin environment
  7. Make sure that Settings > Order > General > Enable notifications for orders is ON at the backend
Steps:
Step Description:

Login in store as User_1

Expected Result:

User_1 logged in store

Step Description:

User_1 set store localization to Localization_2

Expected Result:

Store localization changed

Step Description:

User_1 make any action that must send notification (e.g. Create order)

Expected Result:
  1. Order created
  2. Notification sent to Email_1
  3. Notification added to notifications log
Step Description:

Open Email_1 and check template

Expected Result:

Email_1 inbox contains Template_1
Steps (Expected Result):
1.

User_1 logged in store

2.

Store localization changed

3.
  1. Order created
  2. Notification sent to Email_1
  3. Notification added to notifications log
4.

Email_1 inbox contains Template_1
Steps (Step):
1.

Login in store as User_1

2.

User_1 set store localization to Localization_2

3.

User_1 make any action that must send notification (e.g. Create order)

4.

Open Email_1 and check template
